description_long: This object is a vintage-style megaphone with a robust cylindrical metal body and a large, flared horn at one end. The horn is metallic gray and slightly weathered, while the main body is painted a dark olive green with some visible wear and rust. A prominent, sturdy metal handle arches over the top, attached to the body with riveted brackets, and a secondary grip is mounted on the side for easy carrying. The front features a protective metal cage around the horn, and a circular emblem or logo is affixed to the side. The base is wide and stable, with a dark blue finish and signs of use, suggesting it can be set down securely on flat surfaces. The overall construction appears industrial and durable, suitable for outdoor or urban environments.
description: A vintage, industrial megaphone with a flared metallic horn, olive green cylindrical body, and prominent metal handle and cage. The surface shows signs of wear and rust, with a logo on the side and a wide, stable base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the circular, olive green end of the megaphone and the arched metal handle above, with the protective cage visible.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the flared metallic horn, the side handle, and a visible logo or emblem on the body.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the megaphone, the attachment points of the handle, and the base, with the cage structure clearly visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the horn, side handle, and the cylindrical body, with less emphasis on the logo.
attribute_mouthpiece_design: The mouthpiece is a wide, flared metallic horn with a smooth, rounded edge and a protective metal cage structure surrounding it.
attribute_branding_or_logo: A triangular logo or emblem with text is visible on the side of the body.
